name: John Travolta
abstract: John Joseph Travolta (born February 18, 1954) is an American actor. He began acting in television before transitioning into a leading man in films.

about_quotes.speaker: Steve Allen
about_quotes.evidence: Well if I can’t get Tom Cruise, how about John Travolta? If he’s not available, whoever.
about_quotes.doc_title: Steve Allen interviewed by Monk Rowe, Los Angeles, California, February 15, 1999
